## SimpleFilter interface

A type of filter used in [SimpleFacet](./x-types.simplefacet.md) and extends from [Filter](./x-types.filter.md)<!-- -->. It can be selected or not.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export interface SimpleFilter extends BooleanFilter 
```
<b>Extends:</b> [BooleanFilter](./x-types.booleanfilter.md)

|  Property | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  [modelName](./x-types.simplefilter.modelname.md) | 'SimpleFilter' | Model name to indicate the filter type. |
